title: jupunba curvicarpa var. curvicarpa
intro: Jupunba curvicarpa var. curvicarpa, also known as Jupunba or Jupinba, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Rutaceae and order Sapindales. It has been traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to relieve fever and sore throats. Jupunba curvicarpa var. curvicarpa can be prepared into various herbal products, including tea, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine and bush food recipes.
